metadata.description: SQL Server migration analysis plugins — SSIS package analysis, DACPAC/BACPAC schema extraction, and ETL migration spec generation

plugins.name: ssis-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze SSIS .dtsx packages — extract control flow, data flows, connections, variables, SQL, scripts, column lineage, and migration assessment.

plugins.name: dacpac-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze SQL Server .dacpac and .bacpac packages — extract tables, views, stored procedures, functions, constraints, indexes, schemas, and full database schema metadata.

plugins.name: spec-writer
plugins.description: Generate ETL migration spec sets from SSIS (.ispac/.dtsx) and database (.bacpac/.dacpac) source artifacts. Creates README, CONSTITUTION, and numbered implementation specs for migrating SQL Server ETL to PySpark on Fabric.
